channel.title: Contact Us on Berrytree.org
channel.description: Recent content in Contact Us on Berrytree.org

item.title: Request For Information
item.description:
Request For Information

Research inquiry about Berry family members in the 1850 Smith County, Tennessee census.

We are looking for descendents related to the following people (Most of the data for the people below was gathered from the 1850 census in Smith County, Tennessee)
